name: New-TerminalPresentation
description: Create an empty presentation and set its title, author, theme, and viewport defaults.
example:
$deck = New-TerminalPresentation `
  -Title 'Quarterly engineering review' `
  -Subtitle 'Platform reliability' `
  -Author 'Engineering' `
  -Theme Midnight

name: Add-TerminalSlide
description: Append a slide through the pipeline and compose its elements with the slide DSL.
example:
$deck | Add-TerminalSlide `
  -Title 'Agenda' `
  -Layout TitleAndContent `
  -Content {
    Add-SlideBullet 'Architecture'
    Add-SlideBullet 'Delivery plan'
  } | Out-Null

name: Add-SlideText
description: Add wrapped prose with alignment, color, reveal, and overflow options.

name: Add-SlideTitle
description: Add a prominent title element inside a slide region.

name: Add-SlideSubtitle
description: Add supporting subtitle text with optional alignment and progressive reveal.

name: Add-SlideBullet
description: Add a bullet and optionally reveal it after earlier content.

name: Add-SlideCode
description: Render a syntax-highlighted code block with an optional border.
example:
$deck | Add-TerminalSlide -Title 'Code' -Layout CodeFocus -Content {
  Add-SlideCode `
    -Code "Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending" `
    -Language powershell `
    -Region Code `
    -Border
} | Out-Null

name: Add-SlideTable
description: Format PowerShell objects as a table within the selected slide region.

name: Add-SlideChart
description: Visualize labeled values as bars, a line, sparkline, or gauge.

name: Add-SlideDiagram
description: Build a lightweight node-and-edge diagram with the diagram DSL.

name: Add-SlideDiagramNode
description: Declare a labeled node inside an Add-SlideDiagram content block.

name: Add-SlideDiagramEdge
description: Connect two declared diagram nodes and optionally label their relationship.

name: Add-SlideImage
description: Render a local image as truecolor terminal cells with accessible fallback text.
example:
$imagePath = Join-Path `
  (Get-Module TerminalSlides).ModuleBase `
  'Assets/presentation-team-photo.jpg'

$deck | Add-TerminalSlide `
  -Title 'Team rehearsal' `
  -Layout ImageFocus `
  -Content {
    Add-SlideImage `
      -Path $imagePath `
      -AltText 'Three engineers rehearsing a presentation' `
      -Region Image
  } | Out-Null

name: Add-SlideQuote
description: Add a centered quotation with optional attribution.

name: Add-SlideBox
description: Emphasize a takeaway or warning inside a bordered callout.

name: Add-SlideNotes
description: Attach private speaker notes to the slide currently being composed.

name: Show-TerminalPresentation
description: Present a deck interactively, or render it sequentially when output is redirected.
example: Show-TerminalPresentation -Presentation $deck

name: Start-TerminalSlidesDemo
description: Launch the TerminalSlides feature tour or the Intune Hydration Kit showcase, or return either deck for inspection.
example:
Start-TerminalSlidesDemo
Start-TerminalSlidesDemo -Name IntuneHydrationKit

# Inspect a showcase without presenting it:
$demo = Start-TerminalSlidesDemo `
  -Name IntuneHydrationKit -PassThru

name: Test-TerminalPresentation
description: Check every slide for overflow at one or more terminal viewport sizes.
example:
$results = Test-TerminalPresentation `
  -Presentation $deck `
  -Viewport '80x24', '120x35'

$results | Format-Table Viewport, Slide, Fits

name: Export-TerminalPresentation
description: Write a deck as ANSI, plain text, Markdown, HTML, PSD1, or JSON.
example:
$exportPath = Join-Path `
  ([IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) 'terminalslides-deck.html'

Export-TerminalPresentation `
  -Presentation $deck `
  -Format Html `
  -Path $exportPath

name: Import-TerminalPresentation
description: Load a presentation from PSD1, JSON, Markdown, or Markdown-compatible content.
example:
$jsonPath = Join-Path `
  ([IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) 'terminalslides-deck.json'
Export-TerminalPresentation `
  -Presentation $deck -Format Json -Path $jsonPath | Out-Null

$importedDeck = Import-TerminalPresentation -Path $jsonPath

name: Get-TerminalPresentationTheme
description: List every registered theme or retrieve one theme by name.
example:
Get-TerminalPresentationTheme

$midnight = Get-TerminalPresentationTheme `
  -Name Midnight

name: New-TerminalPresentationTheme
description: Create and register a reusable truecolor theme for the current session.
example:
New-TerminalPresentationTheme `
  -Name Ocean `
  -Background '#06131F' `
  -Foreground '#E7F5FF' `
  -Primary '#38BDF8' `
  -Accent '#A78BFA' | Out-Null

$deck = New-TerminalPresentation `
  -Title 'Ocean deck' -Theme Ocean

name: Get-TerminalPresentationCapability
description: Inspect terminal dimensions, color, Unicode, graphics, redirection, and interactivity support.
example:
Get-TerminalPresentationCapability |
  Format-List HostName, Width, Height, `
    TrueColorSupport, UnicodeSupport, Interactive

name: Get-TerminalSlide
description: Retrieve every slide or select one by one-based index or exact title.
example:
$allSlides = $deck | Get-TerminalSlide
$first = $deck | Get-TerminalSlide -Index 1
$agenda = $deck | Get-TerminalSlide -Title 'Agenda'

name: Set-TerminalSlide
description: Update the title, layout, notes, background, or hidden state of a slide.
example:
$deck | Set-TerminalSlide `
  -Index 2 `
  -Title 'Updated roadmap' `
  -Notes 'Call out the revised date.' | Out-Null

name: Copy-TerminalSlide
description: Clone a slide and append it or insert it at a requested position.
example:
$deck | Copy-TerminalSlide `
  -Index 2 `
  -DestinationIndex 4 | Out-Null

name: Move-TerminalSlide
description: Move a slide to a new one-based position and reindex the deck.
example:
$deck | Move-TerminalSlide `
  -Index 4 `
  -DestinationIndex 2 | Out-Null

name: Remove-TerminalSlide
description: Remove a slide by one-based index and keep remaining indices contiguous.
example:
$deck | Remove-TerminalSlide `
  -Index 3 | Out-Null
